title: harry (p) .. thanksgiving
content:
went to see  **harry p**  today, despite the fact that i am so sleepy! (as usual, i had little sleep at night.)

the bed is calling already, will (might or might not) be back to write something tonight. i don't think any of you, nice readers, care anyway. it's thanksgiving. :)

so, happy thanksgiving to you all -- enjoy the turkey (or whatever thing you had on thursday or plan to have this weekends).

a short reminder: be the one who gives. because it feels better when you give, than when you get.
